rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Routes were already wrapped with withAuth; the gap was error message wording, not missing auth logic","scope":"auth middleware"},{"kind":"convention","text":"withAuth uses 'Missing or invalid Authorization header' for missing tokens, but acceptance criteria requires '{ error: \"Unauthorized\" }'","scope":"src/auth/withAuth.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"checkRole uses 'Forbidden: requires role ...' for RBAC failures, but should normalize to '{ error: \"Unauthorized\" }' for consistency","scope":"src/auth/_auth.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When auth is already implemented, always check exact error message wording against acceptance criteria before assuming the gap is missing code","scope":"auth"}]}
